title: CAU Imphal ORDINANCE 7 of 2007
text: GOVERNMENT OF INDIA , • MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH AND EDUCTION . CENTRAL AGRICULTURAL UNIVERSIT ORDINANC'ff lmphal, the No. VII of 2007 No. CAU[Reg/584/Ord/05/Pt Whereas, the approved Expenditure Finance Committee Memo along with addendum in respect of the sanction of the Central Agricultitral University Scheme under the VIII th Five Year Plan as communicated by the Joint Secretary. Department of AgriculaTrat Research and Education-and-Secretary, Indian Council of Agricultural Research vide their letter number 1(2)/92-P1 and M (Part-Ill) dated 13th October, 1993 provides for the establishment of College of Veterinary Sciences (Mizoram), College of Horticulture and Forestry (Arunachal Pradesh), College of Fisheries (Tripura), College of Agricultural Engineering and Post Harvest Technology (Sikkim), College of Home Science and College of Post Graduate Studies (Meghalaya). And whereas, in 'exercise of the powers conferred by clause (viii) of section 5 and sub- section (2) read with clause (.k) and (o) of sub-section (i) of section 27 of the Central Agricultural University Act, 1992 (No. 40 of 1992) the Board of Management has approved making/issue of the ordinance for establishment of College of Post Graduate Studies. As1 whereas, the Government of India in the Department of Agricultural Research & Education has approved the issue/making of an Ordinance for the establishment of College of Post-Graduate Studies, Barapani, Meghalaya as a constituent college of the Central Agricultural University, hnphal vide letter No. 5-15/2007-CAU dated 26th February, 2008. Now therefore, with the previous approval of the Central Government, I, the Vice- Chancellor, Central Agricultural University, Imphal do hereby make the first Ordinance and notify the following provisions fOr the establishment and management of the College of Post- Graduate Studies as a constituent college of the Central Agricultural University at Barapani, Meghalaya namely: 1. The College of Post-Graduate Studies at Barapani in Meghalaya shall be a constituent college of the Central Agricultural University, In-Thal. 2.
